galois_collapse_numeric_illustration.note: NUMERIC ILLUSTRATION ONLY (floating-point DFT); not a certificate. Shows A(k9,C_m)=sigma^m(Atil(k9)), so the 4 coset PSD equations per k9 collapse to one ring equation.

compression_trivial_char.conclusion: k37=0 slice = 9-compression pair (column sums by direct orbit evaluation); with atilde_j in V this is the elementary obstruction.
